design.description: Create Dispatch Order from PO details, add transport details, and upload all required dispatch documents in FMT PRO.

flows.name: Create dispatch order and upload required dispatch documents
steps: Resolve target PO number from DISPATCH_PO_NUMBER or shared PO context
Open Purchase Order list in FMT PRO and open PO details by PO number

business_rules: Dispatch Order creation starts from PO details screen.
Transport details are entered before dispatch document upload.
All required dispatch documents are attachable in one happy-flow run.
Same file can be reused for mandi tax 9R and mandi tax 9R gatepass.
validations: Target PO number is resolved from env or shared context.
PO details opens for the selected PO number.
Transport details submission shows success or next-step CTA.
Add Dispatch Details opens dispatch document upload section.
All configured local file paths are readable and uploaded.

selector_hints.notes: Fallback includes generic Dispatch Order button text and data-testid.

selector_hints.suggested_selector: input by label/placeholder/name contains vehicle and mobile
selector_hints.notes: Supports label proximity fallback when direct selectors are unstable.
Fallback to global file inputs if label-scoped file inputs are not exposed.

dependencies.required_role: User with PO and DO permissions
